title: heliophila subulata subsp. subulata
intro: Heliophila subulata subsp. subulata, also known as the 'Dune Heliotrope' or 'Dune Rock Jet', is a flowering plant species native to the southern tip of Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Heliophila subulata subsp. subulata include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, for topical application or internal use, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before utilizing it for medicinal purposes.
